nasb.text: For the sons of Israel are My servants; they are My servants whom I brought out from the land of Egypt. I am the Lord your God.

esv.text: For it is to me that the people of Israel are servants. They are my servants whom I brought out of the land of Egypt: I am the Lord your God.

cnv.text: 因為以色列人都是屬我的僕人；他們是我的僕人，是我把他們從埃及地領了出來的；我是耶和華你們的　神。”

ccb.text: 因为以色列人是我的仆人，是我从埃及领出来的仆人。我是你们的上帝耶和华。
